candidate_summary: 12-cycle non-uniform per-position compute/attention budget for transformer decode inspired by Andalusian flamenco compás. Tokens grouped into 12-position cycles with heavier budget at accent beats {3,6,8,10,12}, hemiola binary/ternary gating, and headless position-1 skip mask.

results.title: Position-Aware Depth Decay D3 (2503.08524)
results.rationale: Position-aware non-uniform depth allocation per-token in decode phase directly parallels per-position compute budgeting.

results.title: Mixture-of-Depths (2404.02258)
results.rationale: Dynamic FLOP allocation to specific positions with top-k routing is functionally equivalent to non-uniform per-position budgeting at accent positions.

results.title: Subjective Depth Bayesian Routing (2511.21408)
results.rationale: Dynamic Top-K capacity routing in decoder achieves non-uniform per-position compute allocation, satisfying functional threshold.

results.title: D-LLM Token Adaptive Compute Allocation (NeurIPS 2024)
results.rationale: Token-adaptive compute resource allocation directly matches per-position non-uniform compute budgeting mechanism.

results.title: NVIDIA Skip Softmax Sparse Attention
results.rationale: Skip-softmax on negligible attention blocks functionally implements gated skip mask similar to headless position-1 skip, exceeding functional threshold.

results.title: Dynamic Token Halting Early Exit (2506.22396)
results.rationale: Per-token halting/early-exit achieves non-uniform compute allocation per position, functionally matching candidate.

results.title: HiP Hierarchical Sparse Attention Pruning (2406.09827)
results.rationale: Hierarchical sparse attention with skip mask implements both non-uniform per-position attention and gated skip, directly matching two mechanism components.

results.title: FlashMask Flexible Attention Mask
results.rationale: Flexible attention mask explicitly supporting non-uniform per-position gated skip is a direct functional match to headless skip mask and accent-position weighting.

decision_rationale: All 8 prior-art results hit the threshold under at least one criterion. The candidate's core mechanism (non-uniform per-position compute/attention budget in transformer decode, dynamic gating, and skip mask) is heavily anticipated by Mixture-of-Depths, D3, D-LLM, MoD-style routing, and FlashMask/HiP skip masks. The flamenco compás framing is a surface metaphor over well-established per-position dynamic compute allocation and sparse attention masking. Candidate FAILS novelty verification.
